use_cases: Site-wide navigation header for SaaS landing pages
Component library or template marketplace header
Dark/light theme toggle for user preference
ai_summary: A modern navigation header component featuring the Acme brand, responsive navigation links (Docs, Components, Templates, Pricing), dark/light theme toggle with smooth icon transitions, and a mobile hamburger menu using a slide-out sheet. Built with motion/react for subtle animations, includes hover state transitions on links, and uses shadcn/ui primitives (Button, Sheet, Separator) for a clean, professional appearance suitable for SaaS product pages and developer documentation sites.
